en_title: Epic Games Store Roadmap Promises 5x Faster Boot Times, User Reviews, and More
cn_title: 《Epic Games》Epic游戏商城路线图：启动快5倍与用户评测
subtitle: 五年了，终于要改了
opus_summary: Epic游戏商城在Unreal Fest公布未来12个月路线图，承诺启动速度5倍提升，并引入用户评测、第三方补丁说明等长期缺失功能，但未给出上线日期。

paragraphs.en: The Epic Games Store will soon receive many long-requested features and a major launcher redesign if a newly revealed roadmap pans out accordingly.
paragraphs.cn: 如果一份最新公布的路线图能够按计划实现，Epic游戏商城很快就会迎来许多期待已久的功能，以及一次启动器的重大重设计。

paragraphs.en: Epic Games outlined next steps for the future of its PC digital storefront during a presentation at Unreal Fest in Chicago earlier this week. Slides by X/Twitter user @LuKaOnIndeed feature highlights from Epic's goals for the next 12 months as it seeks to redesign the store for gamers and developers alike (via VGC ).
paragraphs.cn: Epic Games在本周初芝加哥Unreal Fest的一场演讲中概述了其PC数字商店未来的下一步计划。X/Twitter用户@LuKaOnIndeed分享的幻灯片展示了Epic接下来12个月的目标亮点，该公司正致力于为玩家和开发者重新设计商店（消息来自VGC）。

paragraphs.en: It's a long, long list of bullet points, including "up first" highlights like Fortnite chunked installation, third-party patch notes, pre-registration for free-to-play games, storefront rearchitecture, library management improvements, and other features that are expected to arrive for Epic Games Store sooner rather than later. Some of its "up next" updates, which seem slightly further off, include player profiles and avatars, user-written reviews, publisher-funded coupons, and search improvements.
paragraphs.cn: 这份路线图是一长串要点的合集，其中「优先上线」的功能包括：《堡垒之夜》分块安装、第三方补丁说明、免费游戏预注册、商店架构重构、游戏库管理改进，以及其他预计将在近期登陆Epic游戏商城的功能。而一些看起来稍远一些的「下一阶段」更新则包括：玩家档案与头像、用户撰写评测、发行商赞助优惠券以及搜索改进。

paragraphs.en: It's unclear if Epic intends to roll out these new Epic Games Store features in waves, and there is no specific release date for any particular update or the storefront redesign. Still, things like user reviews and third-party patch notes could go a long way for users who have been hesitant to start purchasing their PC games with the Fortnite maker.
paragraphs.cn: 目前尚不清楚Epic是否打算分批推出这些新功能，也没有任何特定更新或商店重设计的具体上线日期。不过，对于一直犹豫是否要在《堡垒之夜》开发商这边购买PC游戏的用户来说，用户评测和第三方补丁说明这类功能或许会大有帮助。

paragraphs.en: Epic Games Store launched in 2018 as Epic's own take on a PC gaming hub. It has attempted to entice both developers and gamers with the promise of offerings like exclusive games , free cross-platform online services , and free games for users .
paragraphs.cn: Epic游戏商城于2018年上线，是Epic对PC游戏中心的独到诠释。它一直试图通过提供独占游戏、免费的跨平台在线服务以及免费赠送游戏等方式来吸引开发者和玩家。

paragraphs.en: "As a developer ourselves, we have always wanted a platform with great economics that connects us directly with our players," Epic founder and CEO Tim Sweeney said at the time. "Thanks to the success of Fortnite, we now have this and are ready to share it with other developers."
paragraphs.cn: 「作为开发者，我们一直想要一个经济模型良好的平台，能够将我们与玩家直接连接起来，」Epic创始人兼CEO蒂姆·斯威尼当时说道。「得益于《堡垒之夜》的成功，我们现在拥有了这样一个平台，并准备将其分享给其他开发者。」

paragraphs.en: However, the Epic Games Store seems to have struggled to stand toe-to-toe with Steam since its launch. In 2021, it was reported that . Court documents revealed in 2023 that Epic had failed to make its store profitable five years post-launch.
paragraphs.cn: 然而，Epic游戏商城自上线以来似乎一直难以与Steam正面抗衡。2021年有报道指出。2023年公开的法庭文件显示，Epic未能在商城推出五年后实现盈利。

paragraphs.en: One thing that's kept many from adopting Epic into their gaming lives is features they feel should have been included at launch. Some have arrived in the years since, with even more promised in today's 12-month roadmap. One slide from the aforementioned Unreal Fest presentation also promised that this "ground-up rebuild" for the launcher will result in a five-times faster cold start.
paragraphs.cn: 阻止许多玩家将Epic融入游戏生活的一个原因是，他们认为有些功能本应在首发时就提供。这些年来，部分功能已经到位，而今日发布的12个月路线图则承诺了更多功能。上述Unreal Fest演示中的一页幻灯片还承诺，对启动器进行「彻底重建」后，冷启动速度将提升五倍。

paragraphs.en: "Every developer in this room and every player we have has experienced challenges with the current launcher," the slide added. "It's time for a change."
paragraphs.cn: 该幻灯片补充道：「在座的每一位开发者以及我们所有的玩家都经历过当前启动器的种种问题。是时候做出改变了。」

paragraphs.en: IGN to check in with the team and learn about its future. For more while we wait to see when and how these new redesign changes will be implemented, you can read why some think the Epic Games Store will never be as good as Steam .
paragraphs.cn: IGN将跟进该团队，了解其未来规划。在等待这些重新设计变更何时及如何实施之际，您可以阅读为什么一些人认为Epic游戏商城永远比不上Steam。
